executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates remain green. Whole-stack certification blocked by stale marketing independent verification (fail since May 28, now ~5530 minutes stale) and pypi-auto-unblocker still missing from self-improvement loop registry.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Rerun marketing independent verification; register pypi-auto-unblocker in self_improvement_loops.json.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing independent verification is stale and failing closed
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification artifact is ~5530 minutes old (since May 28) and verdict is 'fail'. Primary-repo adoption remains measurement-pending. Blocked channels (Reddit, Apollo) prevent new distribution.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing; distribution channels remain externally blocked; measurement hold is active.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun marketing independent verification after any material change in adoption or distribution. Until then, fail-closed is correct behavior.

findings.title: Loop "pypi-auto-unblocker" still has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Self-repair audit stdout reports 1 HIGH finding. Registry (/agents/system/self_improvement_loops.json) contains only 2 loops (ralph-docs-watchdog, agent-architecture-watchdog). pypi-auto-unblocker is not registered.
findings.root_cause: pypi-auto-unblocker was created without a self-improvement mandate and has not been registered in the self-improvement loop registry.
findings.recommended_fix: Register pypi-auto-unblocker in self_improvement_loops.json with checker/runner/verifier entries and a self_improvement_mandate section.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery has 1063 consecutive escalation repeats
findings.mechanism: Health monitor escalation counter shows 1063 repeats at critical level for blocked-channel-recovery timeout. Recovery loop times out every cycle against persistently blocked external channels (Reddit, Apollo).
findings.root_cause: Reddit and Apollo channels remain blocked externally; the recovery loop times out trying blocked paths.
findings.recommended_fix: Either retire the blocked-channel-recovery loop until channels unlock, or refactor it to fail-fast on known-blocked channels instead of timing out.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Agent architecture checker returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Verifier confirms ok (no errors). Independent verification returns qualified_pass. Live topology is coherent: 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 2 running, 1 last-error. Loop integrity clean.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining blockers are external (marketing outcome evidence, pypi-unblocker registry gap).
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain current verifier path; rerun independent verification after each material artifact refresh.

findings.title: Shared market-intelligence consumption: 2 of 3 consumers fresh, 1 stale
findings.mechanism: run.py and distribution_lane_executor.py consume the latest artifact (2026-06-01T09:00:30). reddit_monitor.py is stale (May 28 artifact). Competitor count: 8.
findings.root_cause: reddit_monitor.py last consumed May 28; it needs rerun against the fresher market intelligence.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the next reddit-monitor cron run (at 15:15) refresh the consumer record.

findings.title: Health monitor issues stable at 4 persistent structural blockers
findings.mechanism: Health monitor reports 4 issues: blocked-channel-recovery timeout, stale marketing verification, and 2 blocked-channel-recovery escalation entries (1063 repeats at critical level).
findings.root_cause: Four persistent structural issues remain; the duplicate escalation entry may indicate a health monitor reporting bug.
findings.recommended_fix: Focus repair effort on the 3 distinct underlying issues.

findings.title: Self-repair audit JSON/stdout discrepancy detected
findings.mechanism: self_repair_self_improve_audit.py stdout reports 'HIGH findings: 1' but the JSON artifact self_repair_self_improve_audit_latest.json records 0 high_findings. pypi-auto-unblocker is confirmed missing from registry (only 2 loops).
findings.root_cause: Possible race between stdout and JSON write, or conditional logic mismatch in the audit script.
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate the audit script write path; surface the discrepancy in the next watchdog run.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun marketing independent verification to clear the stale fail artifact
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing verification is ~5530 minutes stale; whole-stack certification is blocked until this artifact is refreshed.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Register pypi-auto-unblocker in the self-improvement loop registry
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Confirmed: 1 HIGH finding from self-repair audit stdout. Registry has only 2 of 24 live loops registered.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Closes the remaining self-improvement gap; pypi-auto-unblocker gains self-improvement coverage.

ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Escalation counter is critical; loop times out every cycle hitting blocked external channels.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Reduces noise and wasted compute from a recovery loop that cannot succeed against persistently blocked channels.

ordered_fix_plan.why_now: stdout says 1 HIGH finding, JSON says 0. This could mask real issues in future runs.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Correct audit reporting prevents masking of real loop registry gaps.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed direct live inspection via openclaw cron list --json: 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 2 running (system-health-monitor + this watchdog), 1 last-error (blocked-channel-recovery timeout).

Ran agent_architecture_checker.py (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK), agent_architecture_verifier.py (ok, no errors), agent_architecture_independent_verify.py (qualified_pass with 2 external errors), loop_integrity_audit.py (clean), self_repair_self_improve_audit.py (stdout: HIGH findings: 1; JSON: 0 — discrepancy flagged).
2 of 3 consumers fresh (run.py, distribution_lane_executor.py use 2026-06-01T09:00:30 artifact). reddit_monitor.py is stale (May 28). Competitor count: 8.
Health monitor now records 4 issues (was 3): new duplicate escalation entry for blocked-channel-recovery. Core pattern unchanged.
Confirmed registry contains only 2 loops (ralph-docs-watchdog, agent-architecture-watchdog). pypi-auto-unblocker is NOT registered. Flagged stdout/JSON discrepancy.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms architecture verifier fails closed on stale signoff, live topology/ownership checks are green, shared market-intelligence reuse is machine-verifiable (2/3 consumers fresh). Fresh artifact produced at 2026-06-01T15:02:54+02:00.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: blocked-channel-recovery has 1063 consecutive escalation repeats
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The recovery loop times out every cycle against persistently blocked external channels (Reddit, Apollo). This generates continuous noise and wasted compute without a path to resolution.
